excerpt: I know Kafka is a highly resilient message broker, but in rare situations, for instance, our DevOps team probably clears the Kafka…

content.html: If my service or database is down, the client receives 500 errors based on our contract with the provider, and the transaction will be auto-reverse.

I know Kafka is a highly resilient message broker, but in rare situations, for instance, our DevOps team probably clears the Kafka information once a year. In that situation, our database is persistent, but Kafka will be down.
